Enterprise grade, without the complexity.

We've engineered Coda from the ground up to provide unparalleled financial clarity. Advanced tools, beautiful interfaces, and uncompromising accuracy.

Automated Reconciliation

Connect your bank accounts securely and let Coda automatically match transactions to invoices and expenses with 99.9% accuracy.

Multi-Entity Management

Manage multiple businesses or subsidiaries under a single login. Consolidated reporting and inter-company transfers handled seamlessly.

Bank-Level Security

Your data is encrypted at rest and in transit. Granular role-based access control ensures employees only see what they need to see.

Real-time Analytics

Live dashboards with cash flow forecasting, P&L reports, and visual insights. Make data-driven decisions with real-time financial intelligence.

Simple, transparent pricing

Choose a plan that scales with your business. No hidden fees.

Starter Pack

For early-stage operations & startups managing core ledgers.

₦5,000/month
or ₦54,000 billed annually

Coda

Terms of Service

By accessing Coda's enterprise financial systems, you agree to these Terms of Service. As a financial operating system, you entrust us with critical business data; in turn, you agree to use the platform lawfully and maintain the confidentiality of your account credentials.

While Coda guarantees 99.9% uptime and rigorous data backups for our core ERP features, the platform is provided without liability for indirect business losses. You remain responsible for the accuracy of the financial and tax data you input into the system.

Coda

Privacy Policy

Coda acts as a data processor for your business. We securely process your financial, payroll, employee, and customer data exclusively to provide our ERP services. We employ industry-standard AES-256 encryption and strict access controls to ensure your corporate data remains confidential, compliant with financial regulations, and is never sold to third parties.

We only ask for personal information when we truly need it to provide a service to you. We collect it by fair and lawful means, with your knowledge and consent. We also let you know why we’re collecting it and how it will be used. We don't share any personally identifying information publicly or with third-parties, except when required to by law.

Coda

The definitive financial operating system for high-growth enterprise businesses.

Product

  • Features
  • Pricing
  • API Documentation

Legal

  • Terms of Service
  • Privacy Policy

Coda is built to comply with Nigerian GAAP and IFRS accounting standards. WHT, VAT, and PAYE tax compliance is automated in accordance with FIRS guidelines. Secured under NDPR regulations.
